content:
A user got stuck in the wrong language after the last updates.
iPad 10 wifi 256 
101385595
Exiting and trying to change the language don't work.
Also tried Fix and reinstalling

Hello, I am a player enjoying the game from Korea.

As new characters are released frequently, I need to create and keep "Deep Clauses" (Secret Pacts) with various traits to match them. However, the current storage limit feels too restrictive, and it is difficult to constantly decompose items to make space.

If simply increasing the default limit is difficult, I suggest adding an option to expand the storage capacity using "Elixir" or the "Precipitate Exchange Currency."

Thank you for considering my suggestion.

When you play the game everything is fine but the longer you stay in the game, the lower the FPS drop, at some point you can reach like 5 FPS, it happened often during the Train event clears when i reach last boss.

癫狂列车中，boss的一条血量如图，大概是30000K左右。
而玩家血量，点满共鸣，大概在4000-7000左右. 
根据星辰篇规则，叠毒的最大上限此时大概在400K-600K左右。

boss的余烬每回合大概有2800K，直伤的话大概能打boss 8400K的血量，但是毒触发余烬的效率只有一半，所以只能打4200k的血量。
假设，我每回合都能把毒叠到上限（很大的假设），算我每回合有500K毒，再假设我每回合都能主动触发一次毒（也是很大的假设），也就是说我每回合毒能打1000K.

那么首先，1000K伤害，连余烬都触发不完。每回合的伤害为：1000K（毒）+ 1500K（余烬触发） =  2500K
那么我需要多少回合能打掉boss的一条血呢？30000K / 2500K = 12 回合
boss有3-6条血不等，我姑且不算boss的那些转阶段和加固回合，至少要花36回合才能毒死一个有三条血的boss. 请问这合理吗？

星辰篇的算力调和，手牌调和，以及毒上限反击上限等，饱受诟病许久。
虽然因为这些限制玩家玩的很不舒服，但无论怎么说，姑且至少数值还在合理范围内，你们长时间不改或许也有相应的理由。
但癫狂列车的数值暴露出了这些机制的问题所在，我希望至少能够在这个新模式中，修改一下星辰篇规则问题。
最好是能够取消毒上限反击上限，再不济，至少也得把上限翻3倍，才能勉强触发完余烬....

I was in last turn to defeat the final boss in the event when kicked out by maintanance. After I got back to the game, the boss was untouched. Tried to close game window, and restart once again, didn't help.

I just redownloaded the game after a short break and I’m confused on why this is happening after every other time I played this NEVER happened. And even when I tried to redo the process, it doesn’t give me a age check or anything 

I sign in through google, and the account I used is verified 18+, so why am I getting this and how can I fix this?

The same thing was happening before with the Chapter 3 card when using Pickman exalt.
The various Discover sources should be looked in to, or at least this posse, for all the special Chapter cards.
我原本是用STEAM玩，因為偶爾想用手機登入，所以把帳號跟我的APPLE帳號連結了，但是用手機登入就算選apple登入，登入後還是變成全新帳號，手機是由IOS商店下載遊戲安裝的
從2/14晚上開始不管重進多少次都沒聲音，遊戲內的都都拉到100還是沒聲音(其他程式沒這問題所以應該不是我手機的問題)

So after clearing these farming stages i get stuck in that second pic screen where i cant click anything. If i restart the game the stage does show as cleared but its kind of annoying. Does it happen on later stages as well?

Finished the boss and the game softlocked me in the map (look at the greyed part of the boss), I can move around but can't interact with anything. I cannot quit game, have to manually close the program.
I’ve beaten the final boss in Chapter 3 on the first two levels, but the game immediately freezes after the boss is defeated. I can still move around but it wont let me move forward in the story
隨便在一個沒滿星的特遣用了auto，之後我就卡死在影片裡那個神秘的地方了，由於沒在看屏幕，我完全不知道這是在哪個階段卡的，不過應該是已經通關之後卡死的🧐
